channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Potholes, 11th June
item.description:
Pot holes been here for months but getting bigger each week
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clay Wood Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People leaving wet wipes - toilet, 11th June
item.description:
People are using this location as a toilet. There is used wet wipes and this is behind the mountain bike trail where kids will frequently go.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mountain Bike / BMX track, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress flytipped, 11th June
item.description:
Large mattress flytipped at the rear of 85 Cotmandene Crescent B5 2RA. In the service road at the rear of the parade of shops..

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81-83, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste repeatedly dumped on street, 11th June
item.description:
Waste is repeatedly dumped outside this house (number 10). It blocks the street for other users, especially wheelchairs and prams, and is unsightly and unhygienic. The chair pictured has been there for weeks, and the duvet for at least a week - it is now covered in mud and has been rained on. It is truly selfish behaviour and keeps happening.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Studholme Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture flytipped on path, 11th June
item.description:
A wardrobe and a cabinet have been flytipped on the footpath outside 85 Cotmandene Crescent BR5 2RA and is causing an onstruction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81-83, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Number of Bushes need to be cut back, 11th June
item.description:
The bushes are overgrown and pavement covered so pedestrians unable to walk freely. Near the crossing so makes it obstructive. Outside 404 and 402

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 11th June
item.description:
Rubbish dumped at end of the road has been scattered by wildlife. Can something be done to address the people that continuously dump food waste and rubbish bags and other fly tipping so it stops happening?! The council shouldn’t have to keep tidying this up and residents shouldn’t have to live with it every morning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Melbourne Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti alongside 41 Westcombe Park Road, 11th June
item.description:
Graffitti is on Foyle Road, directly alongside 41 Wexscombe Park Road, SE3

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Park Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti outside 56 Foyle Road, SE3, 11th June
item.description:
See above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foyle Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on street, 11th June
item.description:
The bin at the bus stop is all over the street again. I know it’s being clearer up in between but I think it either needs emptying more often or a different type of bin put in to stop the foxes getting at it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daily rubbish scattered, 11th June
item.description:
Every single day without fail there is bin bags placed outside by residents of Charlton Church Lane. These bins contain food and other hazardous waste which is ripped apart and spread by foxes. This would be from the bus stop going to the estate agents.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting please, 11th June
item.description:
Thankyou x

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5-12, Croxley Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green in need of TLC, 11th June
item.description:
The grass is getting extremely high, children are struggling to play/walk across and dogs are picking up the sticky seed buds on their fur. I understand all grass cutting is on rotas but please cut asap before an animal or child is injured. Many thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Doveney Close, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting please, 11th June
item.description:
Thankyou x

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 193, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches over pavement, 11th June
item.description:
This tree needs a prune of the lower branches that spread out across over the pavement. It now difficult to walk along pavement with ducking and avoiding branches. Lower ones just need cutting back 2m to then not impeed pavement. A danger to blind people as expect pavement at head height to be clear
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting please, 11th June
item.description:
Thankyou x

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 269, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 11th June
item.description:
Flytipping has been here a week - was reported to love clean streets but no action taken

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Mews, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting please, 11th June
item.description:
Thankyou x
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Walsingham Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish on street, 11th June
item.description:
4 Bramblebury Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roundabout near Erith test centre, 11th June
item.description:
Area coned off for weeks - no work going on - have you forgotten to inform utility company road is ready for work ? Had the work been completed and you haven't collected cones etc ? What is going on ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crabtree Manorway North, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
